programme.desc: Ethan Hawke and Emma Watson star in this thriller about a small town crime that unmasks a horrifying mystery.

programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: A gang of gold-hunting outlaws, headed by the ruthless Left Eye Watkins (Bobby Brown), takes over the peaceful town of Flatridge, tearing the sleepy outpost to shreds as they search for riches. They murder a can-can girl, who is the sister of Rachel (Monica Calhoun), the onetime leader of a notorious all-girl gang. Rachel then rounds up her four old associates, and they seek revenge for her sister. Using teamwork and a sassy attitude, Rachel's gang goes up against Watkins' tough crew.

programme.title: Danger Zone
programme.desc: Rick Morgan (Billy Zane), an American engineer who runs a mine in East Africa, is approached one day by his friend Jim Scott (Robert Downey Jr.), who needs someplace to store canisters of toxic waste. Unfortunately, a spill occurs a short time later, resulting in deaths and Morgan having to leave the country. A year later, he is approached by a government agent (Ron Silver) looking for a missing supply of potentially hazardous poison, which in truth hides something even more valuable.

programme.title: 99 Homes [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: A recently unemployed single father struggles to get back his foreclosed home by working for the real estate broker who is the source of his frustration.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Duke Diver is living the high life as the freewheeling manager of a luxurious resort in Palm Springs, Calif. He soon faces competition from Leo, a former military man who likes the same woman that Duke is interested in. When Diver's past suddenly catches up with him, he must put aside his differences and reluctantly team up with Leo to stop whoever is trying to kill him.

programme.title: Arlington Road
programme.desc: Man begins to suspect his neighbors are not what they appear to be and their secrets could be deadly

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: A mysterious pill that enables the user to access 100% of his brain's abilities transforms a struggling writer into a financial wizard, but it also puts him in a new world with many dangers.

programme.title: Jobs
programme.desc: The story of Steve Jobs' ascension from college dropout into one of the most revered creative entrepreneurs of the 20th century

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah is given thirteen hours to solve a labyrinth and rescue her baby brother.

programme.title: The China Syndrome

Colwyn (Ken Marshall) is the leader of a mythical sword-and-sorcery group in pursuit of "the Beast" that has kidnaped his fiance, Lyssa (Lysette Anthony).

programme.title: The Lazarus Project
programme.desc: A harrowing and frightening thriller about a man who has everything he's ever loved stripped away from him; and to earn his life and family back, he must face obstacles of mystical origins, endure countless tests of his faith, struggle with his own sanity, and explore the depth and the power of his soul.

programme.desc: Princess Salome uses her powers of seduction in an effort to convince King Herod to spare the life of John the Baptist.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: A decorated war veteran becomes entangled in the search for a fellow Medal of Honor winner's killer.

programme.desc: Movie producer Granger is bored in his marriage to Reed. He has an affair with Canale, a temperamental actress, but decides he prefers Reed's company. After he dumps Canale, detective tells him that the star has been stabbed, and all clues point toward Granger as the killer.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

But after he gets there, he discovers a conspiracy among city leaders and the conservatives in the court led by Eunuch Hai, who wants to end the Studying Abroad Campaign launched by the Westernization Movement.

programme.title: Just Getting Started

He soon faces competition from Leo, a former military man who likes the same woman that Duke is interested in. When Diver's past suddenly catches up with him, he must put aside his differences and reluctantly team up with Leo to stop whoever is trying to kill him.

programme.title: Murder Without Motive
programme.desc: Edmund Perry has everything going for him after he graduates with a scholarship to attend Stanford. With his dedication paying off, an encounter with a police officer senselessly ends his life.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Duke Diver is living the high life as the freewheeling manager of a luxurious resort in Palm Springs, Calif. He soon faces competition from Leo, a former military man who likes the same woman that Duke is interested in. When Diver's past suddenly catches up with him, he must put aside his differences and reluctantly team up with Leo to stop whoever is trying to kill him.

programme.title: The Climb
programme.desc: The breath-taking story of two men ... one with a courageous heart who seeks God; the other with an independent spirit who relies on his own strength.

programme.title: On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: When an angel grants a struggling water girl (Taylor Faye Ruffin) three wishes, even her mom (Robin Givens) or coach (Reginald VelJohnson) can't figure out how she became a soccer superstar.

programme.title: Kingdom Men
programme.desc: Pastor Gerald’s job is on the line if he doesn’t increase the attendance of the men in the church. He decides to have a men’s retreat hoping it will fix everything. Little did he know that he’s in for the fight of his life. He realizes God didn’t call him to increase the men at the church but help them.

programme.title: Keisha
programme.desc: Keisha always had a problem finding a decent job in her community. Financial hardship gets worse for her and her son after her grandmother dies and only leaves behind a Bible. Struggling to take care of her son and pay bills she turns to a job at a strip club. It's all to get a new life in a new city and away from the blackmailing child protective services agent. What sacrifices will she make for her and her son?

programme.title: Flew'd Out
programme.desc: Tiara is an up and coming social media influencer after going viral for posting a mans reaction online after denying him sex. In an attempt to grow her online profile, she accepts a date from a man named Josiah for an out of town excursion. Over time, Josiah's intentions become more elaborate, deranged, and sinister. Will Tiara make it out alive?

programme.title: Fall Semester
programme.desc: Kid Kypree is a college student with dreams and ambitions of becoming the next great stand-up comic. One night he gets invited to a party hosted by his old friend Bo that thrusts him into a whirlwind of opportunities and challenges that will test his friendships, resolve, and his sense of humor. He will soon discover that success comes with its own set of comedic twists and turns!

programme.title: Fist of Vengeance
programme.desc: Ciara Johnson is struggling with life after the death of her father in a local martial arts gym. To preserve her father’s legacy, Ciara is determined to win the regional Wushu Regional championship, and to keep the art alive in her father’s memory. However, she discovers a secret operation that is connected to her father’s death. Witness the showdown between legacy, and the new school of martial arts.
Parents, concerned about their son’s violent behavior, learn that their son is the gateway to the apocalypse.
The 13th year of the new millenium brings a 13th month, and with it unlocks the gates from hell.

programme.title: Dragon Crusaders
programme.desc: Fugitive Knights Templar are cursed. They must defeat the wizard-dragon to break the spell and save the world.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Treasure
programme.desc: A treasure hunter is forced into a deadly race to uncover a Christian relic and history’s greatest treasure.

programme.title: Planetquake
programme.desc: A team of leading seismologists must stop a series of earthquakes before it breaks apart the Earth.

programme.title: Frightmare
programme.desc: The gory ghosts of Hollywood's Golden Era return from the grave craving bloody revenge, in Norman Thaddeus Vane's Frightmare! Following the death of legendary horror actor Conrad Radzoff (Ferdy Mayne, The Howling II, Conan the Destroyer) , a group of overzealous drama students steal his corpse from his crypt and take it to the decrepit haunted house where his finest fright films were made. As the night goes on, the students lean the true meaning of terror, as Conrad's vengeful spirit takes them out one by one. Featuring incredible special effects by Chuck E. Stewart (Critters, The X Files, Bruce Almighty) and early performances by Jeffrey Combs (Re-Animator), Nina Talbot (Night Shift, Puppet Master II), Scott Thomson (Police Academy I-IV) and Donna McDaniel (Hollywood Hot Tub). Frightmare is a bloody terror trip from the Tromatic 1980s.

programme.title: Day of the Animals
programme.desc: The depletion of the earth's ozone layer causes animals above the altitude of 5000 feet to begin attacking humans. A group of hikers are trapped in the military quarantine zone, and now must fight their way across the dangerous terrain to safety. Hiker Paul Jenson, a boorish advertising executive, complicates matters by deciding that he should take charge and go a separate way.

programme.title: Mortuary
programme.desc: Christie has been having terrifying nightmares ever since her father drowned. When her boyfriend sees a sinister hooded figure in the town's mortuary, a series of bizarre and terrible circumstances begin to occur. Christie will soon discover the ghastly truth behind her father's death, but in doing so, she may not live to see the morning.

programme.title: Cannibal! The Musical
programme.desc: Cannibal! The Musical is the true story of the only person convicted of cannibalism in America Alfred Packer. The sole survivor of an ill-fated trip to the Colorado Territory, he tells his side of the harrowing tale to news reporter Polly Prye as he awaits his execution. And his story goes like this: While searching for gold and love in the Colorado Territory, he and his companions lost their way and resorted to unthinkable horrors, including toe-tapping songs! Packer and his five wacky mining buddies sing and dance their ways into your heartand then take a bite out of it! Cannibal! The Musical is Oklahoma meets Bloodsucking Freaks. Brought to you by the Troma Team and Trey Parker the Rogers and Hammerstein of Horror!

programme.title: Basket Case 3
programme.desc: Duane recovers from his delusional breakdown to find his freakish basket-bound brother Belial will soon become a father. But not everything is joyous as the once tight knit brothers no longer seem to trust each other.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Peggy and Charles, newlyweds end up spending the night inside a decrepit mansion after a car accident. Charles plans to kill Peggy for her inheritance, but he soon learns that Peggy's family has a dark past. Peggy is not who she seems to be.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An uptight elderly man named Jonas is forced into retirement, and soon discovers his wife Anita's obsession with adopting animals into their home, leading him to use the animals for a hobby of his own.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: In 1950, gold-digging secretary Cathy Finch marries Charlie Marno, an overweight, unhygienic, and grotesque slob of a man after being told by a fortune teller, Madame Vorna, that he will die shortly after inheriting a large sum of money.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A dying elderly bachelor proposes to his crush, but is rejected for his age. He ends up meeting a discredited doctor who helps him switch bodies. In the end he discovers that his crush's affection comes at a price he cannot afford.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Reno Crevice and Sam Forney, a pair of rival gamblers who hate each other with a passion, face off in a series of increasingly dangerous and gruesome games in order to see who will leave town when all is said and done.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Land owner woos snobby, and wealthy woman to help finance a development project. He wins her over with a potion from his ex, voodoo priestess, that contains a deadly warning - resulting in an undead Margaret amorously chasing him without end.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Richard and Della are invited to a cabin owned by their wealthy former best man, Alan. Richard slowly becomes convinced that Della is having an affair with Alan. After murdering the two of them, Richard realizes just how wrong he was.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Stacy and Devlin fall in love. Stacy's fiancée, Mitch sets out to kill Devlin. However, Mitch soon gets a nasty surprise when he discovers Devlin's has a supernatural necklace and proves his love to be strong in the face of death.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Insurance agent James kills his client in a plot to take his client's money and his wife. However James' boss shows up to reveal that he knows about the murder, and blackmails James to meet his demands.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Marty plans to run off with all of the money from charity concerts, but his conscience is trying to get through to him. His greedy banker blackmails him for half of the money, while his conscience is trying to get him to do the right thing.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Mary Jo, is forced into labor on the farm of George and Luisa Yates, in exchange for being sheltered from the police. One day, Mary Jo suffers a head injury and believes that a scarecrow is her lover, which the Yates plan to use for their benefit

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Aspiring ventriloquist Billy Goldman wants to improve his craft. To that end, he seeks out his idol, retired ventriloquist Mr. Ingels for advice. Soon after, Billy finds out that his idol has a dark past, as well as a gruesome secret.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A witch posing as a cosmetic salesperson visits the home of young, eccentric couple, Donald and Judy. She convinces Judy to try a magic necklace that allows the two of them to swap bodies, leaving Donald to try and figure out which one is his wife.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy funeral director exploits grieving families by overcharging and reusing coffins. When his orphaned nephew comes to live with him, the boy discovers his uncle's cruelty-until a deadly twist ensures the undertaker gets a chilling, ironic fate.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Culture" - The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Needs a Maw" - Mr. Drysdale needs investors for his real estate development project, so he enlists the Widow Fenwick, and aims to cement the deal by hitching her to Jed Clampett, who is looking to find a mother for his daughter, Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Garden Party" - Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake. They end up back by their 'cement pond' to handle the 'overflow' from Mrs. Drysdale's party. A gun shot by Granny starts the real party.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Turkey Day" - Elly bonds with the Thanksgiving turkey so the family can't bring themselves to kill it; Mrs Drysdale hires some Indians to take a Thanksgiving picture, which puts Granny on the warpath.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Go Hollywood" - When Jake Clampett tells Jed he's his cousin, he's welcomed into the home and soon has everyone but Jed thinking about and dressing for a role in their next movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Are Overdrawn" - The Clampetts receive an overdraft from the bank intended for the deadbeat actor J.D. 'Jake' Clampett, while he gets their statement and starts to spend their money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Chickadee Returns" - Jethro thinks he's in love with Chickadee Laverne, a stripper he met at the bank. She and the Clampetts have meet and have different ideas about what an "engagement" is, while Miss Hathaway tries to avert this disaster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampette Look" - Cynthia Fenwick makes her filthy rich mother dress in the "Clampett Look" when they visit the Clampetts, since she thinks Elly is a fashion maven. That only reinforces the Clampett's belief that the Fenwicks are poor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Garden" - Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden, while Mr. Drysdale, Miss Hathaway, and a stubborn mule try to stop her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: With Sitting Bull at the Spirit Lake Massacre
programme.desc: A long-thought-lost film finally surfaces after being unseen for over eight decades. Created and copyrighted by Sunset Productions in 1925 but not released until June 15, 1927, this silent epic features the superior Native American actor Chief Yowlachie (performing here under the name Chief Yowlache) as Sitting Bull. Other fine actors in the cast include the always popular Bryant Washburn and a young Bob Steele, who appears under his real name Bob Bradbury Jr. The story takes place in the 1860s or 1870s near Spirit Lake, Iowa. Settlements of whites are growing in that region but the Sioux Indians also have professed their interest in one such settlement. Chief Sitting Bull surveys the settlement at Spirit Lake from afar and with the advice of the Great Spirit vows to retake the land that belonged to his fathers.

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next two stages take place in Quebec. With eight events over two days, SCL Canada is a true ‘heavyweight’. The athletes compete in: Truck Pull, Deadlift with cars, Log Lift, and the Atlas Stones. The World’s Strongest Viking Jean-Francois Caron from Canada is a favourite, as well as current SCL leader Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and promising underdog Jimmy Paquet (Canada).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to the second day in Quebec. The athletes are fighting hard to win this two-day event. The last points of this SCL stage can be won over four outstanding disciplines: Power Stairs, Dumbbell Press, Keg Toss, and finally, the legendary Farmer’s Walk. Who will leave Canada with the yellow ‘Leader Shirt’?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stages 8 and 9 of the SCL are hosted in Vaasa, Finland, taking place over a spectacular two-day event. After 3 wins so far, Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia plans to extend his lead at the top of the table. Among the other 13 highly motivated strongmen, two SCL legends will make their comeback to the competition: Former World Champion of 2015, Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland) and Dainis Zageris (Latvia).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The fight for the Finnish trophy continues. In this unmissable SCL event, the strongmen battle for the win in the Carry and Drag, the Forward Hold, Deadlifting with Cars and the Loading Race. Belsak, Radzikowski and Zageris look good after the first day, but the others haven’t given up yet.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This under 105kg category event is the ultimate preparation for up-and-coming strongman athletes before entering the heavy class. The Lightweight World Championship is a special every year in the SCL calendar as it sees new talents rise and many promising athletes who are gearing up for future tournaments. A total of 25 athletes from 16 different countries make their way to Kokkola, Finland

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Situated in the very heart of the Carpathian Mountains, Sibiu is a Romanian town where the climate is pleasantly mild, offering some of the best weather conditions for a strongman event around Europe. All this, without doubt, set the mood for the high results and showtime vibes in Stage 11 of Strongman Champions League. The competition in Sibiu was organized in six different disciplines

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: From now on every stage of these series will be more than crucial. Curacao is a beautiful Dutch island in the Caribbean, with a great atmosphere to hold another stage of the MLO Strongman Champions League. Let’s see who takes the title here and who will secure a place in the next stage.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Ten of the world’s strongest men gathered in Amman to compete in Jordan’s first-ever Truck-Pull Championship. The contestants race against the clock while pulling a 21-ton truck across the track. One of the most fierce competitors to take part in the event was four-time winner of the World’s Strongest Man competition, Brian Shaw.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Taking place in Corinth, Greece, considered by many the cradle of the sports competition games, an epic strongman battle will mark the last stage before the upcoming big two-day season’s finale in Chetumal, Mexico. In front of more than 5000 spectators, the twelve athletes compete in Log Lifts, Card Deadlift, Conan’s Wheel and Loading.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In this Simply Symons episode, hosts Michael and Liz Symon, alongside Liv Annacone, prepare a summer-inspired dish featuring seared halloumi cheese topped with warm strawberries, fresh mint, pistachios, and a red wine vinaigrette infused with honey and cracked black pepper. Liz creates a homemade strawberry simple syrup using fresh and frozen strawberries, which becomes the base for a refreshing strawberry vodka martini garnished with mint. The hosts discuss the unique properties of halloumi—a Cypriot cheese that doesn't melt and develops a savory crust when seared—and explore the classic pairing of sweet and salty flavors. They also share storage tips for fresh herbs and berries, mention the superior quality of local Harry's berries, and discuss favorite summer TV shows.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon reunite in the kitchen for the very first episode of CHEWED UP. Carla makes Sweet Potato Hummus, Michael debates the name, Clinton avoids cooking, and the chaos kicks off immediately.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon dive into a tailgating-themed episode of CHEWED UP with Michael leading the charge. He fries up crispy Pork Schnitzel Sliders while sharing wild football stories, Carla admits she’s barely tailgated in her life, and Clinton once again finds himself assigned kitchen tasks he may or may not be qualified for. Between talk of The Chew’s abrupt cancellation, psychic predictions, and potato roll “squish” debates, the chaos continues.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton ushers in sweater weather with a decadent, over-the-top hot chocolate while the crew revisits the infamous "Eggnog-gate" story - a stomach-turning behind-the-scenes tale from their network TV days. Cozy vibes meet barely appropriate storytelling.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off the week with Crispy Baked Chicken Wings tossed in a hot honey and lime glaze. The hosts look back on the freeing final weeks of The Chew before its abrupt end, and Michael delivers a passionate rant against air fryers. The trio introduces their new interactive "Fan Fridge" segment, and Clinton shares a hilarious story about how eating messy wings on a date made him realize he was gay!

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall brings the heat with a comforting Nashville Hot Chicken Mac and Cheese. Carla builds a heavily spiced, vibrant cheese sauce and folds in crispy chicken and large elbow pasta. The hosts reminisce about Carla's famous ground nut stew from Top Chef, discuss their competitive streaks, and debate the merits of retro candies like Peeps and the 100 Grand bar.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly embraces fall with a recipe for Pumpkin Spice Muffins that double as cupcakes when topped with frosting. While the treats bake, the hosts debate whether muffins belong at breakfast or dessert and share their absolute worst live television disasters including Michael cooking during an active fire and Clinton slicing his finger on live TV.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall kicks off Monday with an appetizer: Deviled Eggs Three Ways, including a beautiful beet-soaked variation. Things go hilariously off the rails when Carla accidentally adds too much liquid to her yolk filling, turning it into a soupy mess. The hosts embrace the chaos and try to fix it, while also chatting about the Wicked movie, hating cottage cheese, and giving away a trio of Pop Mustard.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly elevates lunchtime with savory French Onion Soup Tartines, topped with melted Gruyere. While the onions caramelize, the trio discusses their love for French food, debates the perfect early dinner time for getting older, and shares hilarious stories about awkward fan encounters including the time a woman on a crowded train told Clinton he looked "so much fatter in person".

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Friday dessert day, and Michael Symon is baking up a batch of his famous brown butter bittersweet chocolate chip cookies. While the cookies bake, the hosts hilariously debate the size of Michael's head, share the secret to always having warm cookies ready, and Clinton confesses his crush on former NPR host David Greene. The episode wraps up with a Frontgate apron giveaway and plenty of sweet, chaotic banter.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes a quick, "uptown trashy" appetizer: Deviled Cheese Toast. While baking the cheesy, pickle-studded baguette slices, the hosts discuss nostalgic white bread, launch their interactive "Fan Fridge" segment, and go on a passionate rant against celebrities who lie about taking weight-loss injections.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts welcome their first guest, Chef Ayesha Nurdjaja. Michael Symon prepares crispy Beef Kefta, while Ayesha whips up her famous Whipped Feta. Ayesha shares the inspiring story of how she broke into the restaurant industry by sweeping floors, and the group dishes on the intense reality of competing on Bobby Flay's Titans.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Chef Ayesha Nurdjaja sticks around for a hilarious Friday dessert episode as Carla Hall bakes her portable Sweet Potato Cobbler Bars. The group shares funny stories about accidentally cursing in front of kids, debates the most overrated desserts, and reveals the secret ingredients their grandmothers used to make their family recipes so special.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave makes an incredibly unlikely dish for him to make: a casserole. Dave has Oscar and Emmy-winning writer/director Cord Jefferson as his guest and makes chicken divan to try to bring him back to his childhood. The duo talk their recent trip to Las Vegas together, Cord's unusual route to where he is today, and their philosophies on failure and success. They talk about maintaining a worldly curiosity, trying new things, and how learning what you don't like can be just as important as learning what you do, then finish with a MOIF about Vegas.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave turns a solo episode into a shabu-shabu meal with our pal Chris Ying. They talk about the beauty of dishes like shabu-shabu, whether they like fish balls, and how Dave makes a delicious sauce for the dish. The duo then talks about Dave's recent trip to San Francisco, Chef Corey Lee and his restaurants, and both the admiration and ire Corey causes in Dave... for being so dang good.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Designing a Menu for Tyler Huggins" - Dave and Chris Ying start menu-planning for their friend, Tyler Huggins, outdoorsman, entrepreneur, son of bison farmers, beer drinker, and founder of Meati. Spoiler alert: This one’s a struggle.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Coffee expert Joey Chase goes on a pilgrimage along an ancient Ethiopian trading route that starts with the modern latte art cafes in Addis Ababa, then through the coffee kingdom of Jimma to the 10,000+-year-old wild coffee Yayu Forest. Village elders share the age-old secrets of hand processing, fire-pit roasting, and brewing of beans followed by a traditional feast.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: After sharing a first-ever taste of coffee in a remote Maasai village, followed by an exploration of the terrain with some new-found friends, Joey explores a grandiose coffee estate in Mt. Kenya. He then jousts with coffee buyers in Nairbobi's auction house and experiences the hand sorting and elaborate tasting of over 100 distinctive coffees in a British Tudor-style plantation cottage.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Touting the practicality of gondola travel, Joey explores the canals of Venice and discovers the oldest coffee shop in Europe. The trail to classic Italian espresso leads from Illy Coffee near the high-fashion metropolis of Trieste to the medieval town of Scarperia where espresso machines are manufactured. Florence boasts a famous barista who prepares a masterful farewell espresso.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: An exploration of Paris's distinctive cafe culture reveals a renaissance of coffee-inspired cuisine, pastries, and spirits. World-renowned "Noses" in the south of France reveal the complex contribution that fragrance and aroma make toward the perfect cup as Joey pursues the development of a coffee perfume.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Following an excursion to the extremely remote Gnobe Bugle Village, Joey Jeep-treks the terrain from the top of Volcan Baru. The search for coffee known to cost $1,000 per pound leads Joey to the eclectic town of Boquete, a plunge-worthy volcanic river-filled-crevasse, and awe-inspiring Gesha coffee farms with more rainbows and hummingbirds than one could possibly imagine.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: All roads in the pursuit of excellence lead to Japan. Joey discovers that specialty canned coffee from a vending machine pairs well with street food. Bullet train travel leads to a tea farm trek and tasting, coffee in a rickshaw, and Yemen mocha brewed Arab style. Joey makes coffee history in Kyoto preparing and brewing "Geisha" coffee with an authentic Japanese Geisha.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: In the wake of an expedition along the slopes of active volcanic calderas, Joey heads to Big Island Coffee where coffee, cacao, and papaya abound, sheep maintain the landscaping, and the coffee tastes like pop rocks. A Jurassic-inspired detour leads through Akaka Falls, the green turtle pools, and a vanilla bean farm. A salt-massaged coffee is celebrated with Rusty's Hawaiian Coffee Farms.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia heads to South Carolina to meet the many talented artisans that define Lowcountry. From a basket weaver who is keeping the sweetgrass tradition of the Gullah Geechee people alive, to an intercoastal inspired shrimp recipe served in ironware crafted right down the street. Find out why the Lowcountry is defined by its character as much as it is a spot on the map.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia travels to a festival in the Ozarks where she is teaching a cooking class. We follow her as she prepares and gathers her ingredients — we meet a small town chicken farmer, gather produce at the local farmers market, and set the table at a local textile studio where Georgia learns to dye napkins.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia is in Charleston, South Carolina where she is preparing a dinner at historic Fenwick Hall. She invites a legendary queen of Southern cooking to come by and teach her the secret to her two ingredient biscuits, learns a Nigerian inspired cocktail from a local sommelier, and heads out on the water to harvest oysters. Georgia also shares her tips for setting a southern outdoor table.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia visits Tuscany to get back to her own roots, and learn about the generations of families who are carrying on their family's traditions, some for centuries. She goes truffle hunting, learns to make fresh pasta, how to taste wine, and samples the incredible cheeses from the sheep grazing in front of her - experiencing the true value in living off the land.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: This week we're helping a young family deck out their backyard to add some much-needed outdoor living space. The new wood deck we’re adding will connect two different access points from the house and transform the way the family uses their backyard

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: A young, growing family has a master bathroom that needs to grow too... but it can't, so we're making the most of what they have by updating the flooring, wall finishes and vanity. The changes not only update the space, they add necessary storage as well.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: The family room is one of the busiest in a home, so Chelsea wants to update hers for her family and her guests. The kids need storage space for their toys, but Chelsea wants to keep it out of sight so we’re creating built in shelving and cabinets to conceal them.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: When a first-time homeowner takes on a kitchen renovation and realizes she’s bitten off a little more than she can chew… Danny and Chelsea come alongside to help her tackle some flooring fixes, cabinet modifications and backsplash installation.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: People have lots of reasons to upgrade their garages. Most want more organized storage and a cleaner, more attractive space. These homeowners want all of those things, but they also need a suitable home for a fast and shiny member of the family

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: When you work from home, sometimes you have to be really creative about where and how you set up your office. These homeowners had to carve a corner out of the Master Closet so we’re helping the make it both a better closet and a better office.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Join Danny, Chelsea and the crew as they bring a couple's 1980's kitchen into the twenty-first century. In part one we remove some dated cabinetry, dated lighting and the dreaded pop-corn ceiling before we lay out a new lighting plan and refinish the cabinets.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Join Danny, Chelsea and the crew as they bring a couple's 1980's kitchen into the twenty-first century. In part two we install a great new backsplash, add a cool coating to the counters and finalize the installation of the new lighting.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We're helping a retired homeowner re-kindle her love for the arts by converting her storage shed into an art studio. Once we clean-up the floor plan, add some cabinets and climate control… the space is ready to inspire it’s owner to create and enjoy it.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: This is part 1 of a two-part community-wide project to bring hope to Danny’s hometown after a devastating hurricane. The storm demolished a downtown building, leaving an eyesore empty lot but Danny and an army of volunteers are creating a beautiful pocket park to fill it.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: This is part 2 of a two-part community-wide project to bring hope to Danny’s hometown after a devastating hurricane. . The storm demolished a downtown building, leaving an eyesore empty lot but Danny and an army of volunteers are creating a beautiful pocket park to fill it.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: When the house at the end of the cul-de-sac hasn't changed in 28 years, it's time for some front porch rehab! The owners love the house they raised their children in, but they want to update the look of the front porch and the overgrown landscaping that surrounds it.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: A family with a tiny patio and a huge back yard gets some help from Danny and the crew to make use of their space. Adding a second patio of large format pavers starts the process, while some modifications to family’s storage shed and the addition of a fire pit wrap it up.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: If your friends and family always enter your house through the laundry room, it better be a great one. Danny, Chelsea, and the crew rally to give this house a clean entrance complete with a cool new butcher block counter-top and an overflow pantry for the nearby kitchen.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: This week we're helping a couple update a family room that looks smaller than it actually is. We’re removing part of a built-in cabinet system that overwhelms the room and adding some character to a fireplace wall to move it from “forgettable” to “focal.”

programme.title: Mythical Roads
programme.desc: Istanbul: a city of the world, a monster of a city. A city of 18 million inhabitants that is defined in history as the place where Asia meets Europe. The Bosphorus channel cuts the city in two. The Western shore is in Europe, the Eastern in Asia. Istanbul is a wharf.

programme.title: Mythical Roads
programme.desc: Your journey begins with a trek from Bishkek, the capital of Kyrgyzstan, to Lake Issyk Kul. Then, head through the mountains and pasture where shepherds live. On your way to Tajikistan, you will cross the Trans-Alay mountains in the Western Pamirs populated by the Kyrgyz people of nomadic tradition.

programme.title: The New Environmentalists
programme.desc: Biodiversity is a central component to the successful operation of Earth's natural systems. Meet people from Haiti, Myanmar, Honduras, Kenya, Canada, and Scotland who spend time and energy securing healthy local environmental regulations.

programme.title: Green Tourism

programme.title: Green Paradise

programme.title: Green Paradise
programme.desc: With its wide-open spaces and pristine coastline, the province of KwaZulu-Natal has become one of South Africa's ecotourism havens. Away from the carefree atmosphere of its beaches, become a privileged witness to KwaZulu-Natal's well-preserved flora, fauna, and wildlife, possibly "The Big Five?"

programme.title: Super Wings

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: At a deep-sea base, Super Wings and ocean pals unite to hoist a damaged base after a belt tug-of-war. In Madagascar, Eddie uses comic-book courage to find an elephant bird feather and save his dad in a thrilling cliffside rescue.

programme.title: Super Wings

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: On a Bermuda Triangle island, Jett and Runi battle a junk monster and restore the beach for Kyle and his dad. Then in Chiang Mai, the team douses flames, reunites baby elephant Paya with her mom, and celebrates by filming their happy day.

programme.title: Super Wings

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a kite to a boy named Akas in the Himalayas, who wants to fly it in a kite festival. Red Pandas take off with the kite and Jett pursues them. When he runs into trouble and gets pinned under a rock, Dizzy shows up with her rescue gear to save the day.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett goes to Venice, Italy with a mask for Luca to wear at his masquerade party. Jett and Luca set out on a gondola to deliver the invitations, but when they run into a waterway traffic jam, Paul must show up to unclog the canal traffic.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Princess Maribelle from England asks for sparkly collars for her puppies to wear at her royal tea party. When the puppies escape and run every which way through the garden, Jett and Jerome join forces to round them up.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Riley from Hollywood is directing his first action film. Jett brings an alien mask and ends up acting as the monster. Riley’s demands get out of hand, so Jerome comes to co-star and help him bring about a peaceful ending.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett takes a pair of running shoes that light up to Lorna in Kenya. She’s going to run in a big race. While training she crosses paths with a lost baby wildebeast. Bello comes to play a game and reunite the baby with its parents.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett has a feathered headdress for Camila from Brazil. She’s dancing the samba in a Carnival parade. Jerome comes to help her with her dance moves and Jett uses his Jett Speed to fix Camila’s float when it suffers a breakdown.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Drew in Canada asks for ice skates so that he can play on an ice hockey team. When he gets to the rink he’s so nervous that he can’t play. Former Mountie Grand Albert gives Drew confidence-boosting tips so he can score the big goal.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Yuri from Russia is part of a family circus. He needs a unicycle for his act on the high wire. The rest of the family is on their way when the circus train breaks down. Jerome performs an amazing act for the crowd while Jett goes to help them.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Karl from Norway asks for a Viking helmet. He goes to Viking Camp where Jett is mistaken for a dragon. The campers chase Jett onto a ship that heads for a waterfall. Mira comes and pushes them away from disaster.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Get moving with Baby Einstein! Real, live-action footage and classical melodies engage young viewers as they discover simple words related to movement. Enjoy encouraging melodies and live-action footage of babies and animals as you learn and move alongside your favorite Baby Einstein friends. Dance along as you watch real, live action footage of animals, children, and toys.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes; from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that; the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: No No Song & More Kids Songs
programme.desc: Oh no! The kids want to eat junk food but mummy is not allowing them to eat. Enjoy this No No song where mummy is saying no for everything.

programme.title: Loco Nuts Nursery Rhymes & Kids Songs - Non Stop
programme.desc: Kids songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! programme.title: Cars & Trucks Formation For Kids
programme.desc: A transport adventure for all! Have fun with the cool cartoon cars while they are magically formed and are off to perform their day’s duty. Children’s love for cars and trucks and everything in between fulfilled in this action-packed playlist. Watch as the garbage truck, fire engine, police car, and more transportation come together to keep their city clean and safe.

programme.title: Super Supremes Wheels On The Bus & More Popular Kids Song
programme.desc: Do you kids know Wheels on the Bus? Learn this classic nursery rhyme with The Supremes, plus many other fun songs and dances.

programme.title: Shapes Songs and More Learning Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Learning time made fun and easy! This compilation is all about the different shapes we see around us everyday a Triangle, Square, Circle, Rectangle and lot more through kids songs and nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus Nursery Rhymes For Children - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Wheels on the bus is a nursery rhymes that little babies love! programme.title: Top 10 Nursery Rhymes - Kids TV
programme.desc: Kids songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join us, as they sing along, dance in this fun kids videos. Learn preschool songs like This is the way, Old Macdonald, Humpty Dumpty, Five little babies, Twinkle Twinkle, Wheels on the Bus, Finger Family and more.

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus & More Nursery Rhymes - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Welcome to the mystical and of the Little Treehouse! where you are take non magical nursery rhymes journey. Kids will laugh, dance, sing, and play along with our video, learning kids songs like I spy song, to market to market, animals sounds song, mary had a little lamb, row row row your boat and much, much more while enjoying our friendly characters.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and the Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's lab in hopes of deciphering his roboti-sizer system. While underground, Sonic spots his now roboti-sized Uncle Chuck aboard a Badlands bound mine-train and devises a plan for his rescue.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation, his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sleet and Dingo plan to collect the taxes owed to Robotnik from the Duke of Velcronia but keep it for themselves.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia is invited to a debutante ball, but before she can be officially announced to society, she and her brothers, Manic and Sonic have an important mission.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik organizes a track meet to lure Sonic into a trap.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The sinister Robotnik blackmails Cyrus, an old friend of Sonic's, by holding his father hostage.

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A homecoming is interrupted for Sonic, Sonia and Manic when Sleet and Dingo arrive to collect back taxes after returning to their birthplace.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik learns that the most powerful gemstone -- able to create life itself -- is located in Prehistoric Times.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Sonic rescues a village from a flash flood, he's left with the job of babysitting three baby Groundhogs.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik shrinks Sonic and Tails with a shrink ray and puts them into his terrarium. Sonic and Tails escape on the back of a gecko, reverse the shrink ray to restore themselves to normal, then use it to shrink Scratch and Grounder, and put them...

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik lures Sonic into a round-the-planet vehicle race called the Mobius 5000 by threatening to foreclose on a loan to an orphanage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a lifeguard and helps her friends safely enjoy their surfing. // Thunderbell is looking extremely worried. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While at Orange's general store to pick up a package, Berrykin Bloom chats with Orange about the pogostick he gave her to help her reach the upper shelves. She is very appreciative. He ends up getting a package of special berry seeds he ordered, not the vacation magazine Orange thought he came for. He explains how the seeds were a better purchase because of all the benefits to the Berryworks but now he can no longer afford a vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum decides to hold a dance recital at Strawberry's Café Cabaret stage and sends out a stack of invitations. She forgets, however, to check the sign-up sheet at the Café and schedules it for the same night as Blueberry is scheduled to read to the baby Berrykins. Strawberry tells Plum she cannot hold the recital in the Café on her chosen day because the Café is booked.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Overhearing Blueberry reading a story to the baby Berrykins about the scary Galumphalot, Orange is uncharacteristically shaken. She determines she doesn't want anything scary around her, just relaxation. But while the girls are having a hair-styling party at Lemon's salon, a malfunction at the BerryWorks causes the whole town to go dark. And Orange begins to get really anxious.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry has become obsessed with the mystery book detective heroine, Patti Persimmon. She decorates her store with Patti posters and rearranges her shelves to make room for all the Patti books she's ordered. Blueberry begins to neglect outings with her friends and even goes so far as to dress like her idol just to emulate her. She then starts looking for cases to solve around town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While in the midst of a cake decorating demonstration at the café, the girls are uncharacteristically interrupted by an excited Princess Berrykin. She announces the Berrykins have decided to revive the old tradition of the Berry Bitty Buggy Derby. While the girls enthusiastically recount the stories they've heard about it and ask the Princess questions, Blueberry, carrying enough books to block her view, comes through the door and unknowingly interrupts the Princess.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's time again for the Dance-Off between the Big Bitty City Dance Team and the Berry Bitty City Dancers. Plum is stressed out and frazzled because she desperately wants to win. And the Big Bitty City Dancers are a force to be reckoned with. They are elegant and beautifully synchronized. Plum shows the girls a maze of dance steps that she's choreographed in the hopes of creating a winning piece. The problem is, the contest is only 1 week away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls are all gathered at the café. Strawberry is experimenting making applesauce from scratch with a mallet (and making a mess) while the rest busily make their own wrapping paper and bows for the annual gift exchange they hold in celebration of First Frost. Mr. Longface stops by and Strawberry offers him some fresh applesauce but he declines, as he doesn't care for it. He's only there for some tea and, being that he's new in town, doesn't know what the group is up to.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the "Glimmerberry Gathering".

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon is ecstatic. She races out of her salon and goes around to the other girls' houses proclaiming that she "did it!" and beckoning them to join her. They follow her back and are completely dazzled by her newest creation - Glamicures. They are brightly colored, jeweled manicures with tiny microchips inside that play songs when the wearer moves her hand. Each girl lines up to receive her new glamicure and soon there is a cacophony of color and sound.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While working in her store, Orange overhears the Berrykins laughing and shouting outside. When she goes to the door to investigate, a clump of dandelion fluff gets blown inside chased by three Berrykins. She watches as they head butt the clump around until it floats back toward Orange. Just as it floats close, she gives it a bat sending it outside and the Berrykins happily chasing after it. Wanting in on the fun, she joins them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While enjoying lunch in the café, the girls are interrupted by some music coming from the gazebo. They head outside and find Sadiebug and Kadiebug wearing badges and standing by a banner and podium. A group of chairs are set up in front of them. The twins begin to announce, and then argue, that they are starting a club - a good citizens club. The girls are shocked as the twins argue with each other all the time.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With all the Baby Berrykins running around Berry Bitty City, Princess Berrykin decides to build a Day Care Center and playground. But she's worried because it's dull-looking - all grey metal and brown wood. She asks Strawberry whom might be good to help her out. And two names immediately come to her mind - Lemon and Raspberry! The Princess confesses she's always admired their sense of design and style.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Finding she has some free time one morning, Strawberry visits Berrykin Bloom who is filled with excitement over his new crop of Berry Bitty fruits and vegetables; his garden has never grown so much produce! He can't wait to share his new crop (the perfect bitty size) with Berry Bitty City, so Strawberry volunteers to help him transport the produce to Orange's General Store.

programme.title: Doolittle's Raiders: A Final Toast
programme.desc: The bottle of 1896 Hennessy Cognac was uncorked in front of hundreds of people. The surviving World War II veterans from one of historys greatest military missions were about to raise their silver goblets one last time ending a decades long tradition. It was time for the veterans to hold this final toast. They could wait no longer. Their numbers had dwindled to just a few. Many of the names of the 80 flyers who took part in the April 18, 1942 raid on Japan may not be familiar to most, but collectively they will always be known in history as the Doolittle Tokyo Raiders. Long ago these American flyers, aboard 16 B-25 bombers, had accomplished a daring mission that changed the morale of an entire nation. The aviators, led by famed commander Lt. Col. James Harold Doolittle, had taken the fight directly to the enemy for the first time in the war and delivered retribution for Japans sneak attack on Pearl Harbor on December 7, 1941.

programme.title: Eagles of Mercy
programme.desc: EAGLES OF MERCY recounts a seldom-told chapter in the World War II narrative, picking up in the opening moments of D-Day. In the early hours of June 6, 1944, two young American medics with the 101st Airborne Screaming Eagles parachuted into France, and soon found themselves trapped in a 12th-century Norman church in the small village of Angoville-au-Plain. Medics Robert Wright and Kenneth Moore provided first aid to the first casualties of D-Day while a savage battle raged outside between American and German forces. During the documentary, Wright and Moore recount the rigors of basic training, parachuting into Normandy ahead of the amphibious landing on Utah Beach, surviving German anti-aircraft artillery and carrying on their life-saving work even when their unit retreated. EAGLES OF MERCY supplements these compelling stories with newsreel footage, re-enactments and interviews with fellow medics and residents of Angoville.

programme.title: Fannie's Last Supper
programme.desc: Join culinary expert Christopher Kimball and his team of test kitchen sleuths as they attempt to recreate an authentic turn-of-the-century 12-course dinner. For two years, Kimball painstakingly researched and tested recipes from The Boston Cooking School Cook Book, written in 1896 by Fannie Farmer. Tracking down unusual ingredients, discovering forgotten techniques and battling a finicky wood stove are just part of the fun as the pressure builds for the crew to pull off a perfectly-orchestrated meal for their distinguished guests.The project required the team, lead by head chef Erin McMurrin, to constantly regulate the heat on a cast-iron wood stove and work in the Victorian-era kitchen without the benefit of modern appliances. The courses they prepare include: rissoles (filled and fried puff pastry), mock turtle soup with fried brain balls, lobster lAmricaine, roast goose with chestnut stuffing and jus, wood-grilled salmon, roast saddle of venison, Canton punch, three molded Victorian jellies and a spectacular French-inspired Mandarin cake.This special details not only the cooking and serving of the dinner itself, but travels back in time to investigate the life of Fannie Farmer and the world of Victorian cooking, including the foods, the cookware, and the kitchens in an effort to connect the present to the past.

programme.title: We Hold These Truths: The Global Quest for Liberty
programme.desc: This lively documentary explores the promise and global influence of Americas expression of freedom, the Declaration of Independence. Since 1776, more than 100 nations have declared their independence, modeling their declarations on Americas. From Vietnam to Venezuela, from Prague to Hong Kong, millions of lives have been touched by the ideals written in this enduring document. Host Douglas Ginsburg, Federal Judge on the U.S. Court of Appeals, D.C. Circuit, interviews leading experts and ordinary citizens from around the world. In Paris, at the Palace of Versailles, he meets a descendant of the Marquis de Lafayette. In Prague, he tours a cold war bunker and learns that the Czech Republic's journey toward independence mirrors the three great waves of independence that swept the world in the twentieth century. He meets immigrants from Hong Kong, Venezuela, and Vietnam, all seeking the ideals of Life, Liberty and the Pursuit of Happiness. In the United States, Judge Ginsburg travels from Philadelphia to Baltimore to New York and beyond to learn how the words of the Declaration influenced the abolitionist movement, the Women's Suffrage movement, and iconic civil rights figures like Frederick Douglass and Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. WE HOLD THESE TRUTHS is a revealing and fascinating look at this extraordinary and enduring document.

programme.title: Remember Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: The focus of this film is on the military and civilian survivors of Pearl Harbor, all of whom had totally different experiences onDecember 7, 1941.

programme.title: Omaha Beach: Honor and Sacrifice
programme.desc: OMAHA BEACH: HONOR AND SACRIFICE shows the very personal stories of several veterans as they return to Omaha Beach and documents the celebration in Normandy that continues to this day as a result of their acts of courage and determination on June 6, 1944.On D-Day, a roughly 7,000-yard stretch of beach in Normandy, France given the code name Omaha proved to be the Allies' biggest obstacle to the success of Operation Overlord. The assignment to take Omaha Beach, establish a beachhead, and move inland into France was given to two American divisions the already battle-hardened 1st Infantry Division (The Big Red One) and the untested 29th Infantry Division (The Blue and the Gray), who had yet to see any combat in World War II.American Naval Combat Demolition Units also hit the beach that day, writing their own individual stories of horror and heroism. Seven decades after the Boys of Omaha Beach landed, many veterans are returning to this part of the Normandy coast for the last time. Other soldiers who were there on D-Day have also come back for the first time since that historic day, looking for closure as they enter the final years of their lives.

programme.title: War Journal: The Incredible World War II Escape of Major Damon Rocky Gause
programme.desc: The thrilling true story of a nearly impossible escape from prison camp during World War II. In 1942, American airman Rocky Gause escaped a prison camp on the Bataan Peninsula, swam to nearby Corregidor Island, and then sailed with U.S. serviceman William Osborne in a leaky fishing boat 3,200 miles from the Philippines to Australia. Despite facing typhoons, constant threats from Japanese ships, submarines and airplanes, a lack of water and food, and even a visit to the worlds largest leper colony, both men survived to recount their harrowing 52-day ordeal. Filmed in Bataan, Corregidor, and in Manila, the documentary features the journals of Gause and Osborne, archival footage and photos, and interviews with relatives and Army associates. It is narrated by three-time Emmy Award-winning actor Chandler Massey, and actor Kyle Chandler (Argo, Zero Dark Thirty and Carol) provides the voice of Rocky.
